source.extractionBoundary: Plugin reference template stores only the responsive card Collection component subtree and required page-level dependencies. Source resource IDs are redacted/placeholders; generated packages must remap all resource IDs to the target app.

usageContract.host: Dashboard Page Layouts v1.1 business-content slot such as section_content_area
usageContract.copyRule: Copy collection_control_responsive_card_wrapper and all descendants as the component root. Do not recreate the component from a generic card Collection or simplified controls.
usageContract.immutableByDefault: All containers and controls are locked unless listed in editableRegions or repeatableOptionalParts.
requiredDependencies: pageLevelDependencies.filterVars and pageLevelDependencies.filter when search/fulltext is present
pageLevelDependencies.tempVars when delete confirmation is present
collection root attrs.actions when item operation buttons are present
grid_table_col_item_op_menu action buttons must bind to Collection actions when present
usageContract.displayOnlyMode: When the source is Form Report/Data Report or the business requirement is display-only, card_col_caption and card_col_item_multi_select may be omitted; do not emit edit/delete actions for view-only datasets.

editableRegions.rule: May edit business title content only. card_col_title text must match the Collection data source/business region. Preserve wrapper layout/style.

May add/delete normal-mode controls. Recommended to keep Search filter and Add item button; may change Search title/placeholder and Add item button text. Every button must keep a valid action binding.

May map repeated item fields to the selected data source. Use Dynamic user for user fields, Dynamic image only for image fields, Dynamic file for file/attachment fields, and Dynamic field otherwise. Include a subject-style Large/Semi bold Dynamic field when a subject/title field exists.
Optional item-operation host. May be omitted for display-only or non-Data List/Document Library sources. If present, preserve dropbar shell and bind every operation button to Collection actions.
May add/remove item operation buttons such as Edit/Delete. Every button must bind to a Collection action; delete requires confirmation temp variable and conditional delete flow.

repeatableOptionalParts.rule: May contain multiple item-operation buttons when the Collection source supports item operations. Buttons are not allowed for Form Report/Data Report view-only datasets.

lockedRegions.rule: Component root and structural wrapper styles/layout must remain export-shape identical except for allowed descendant edits.
Caption area style/layout must remain unchanged when included. It may be omitted only for display-only or non-operational datasets.

Collection root settings, responsive layout, search/fulltext wiring, pagination, data/action wiring, and item template host must remain unchanged except app-specific data-source/action remapping through supported generator logic.

dynamicControlMappingRules.imageField: dynamic-image; do not emit if selected data source has no image field
dynamicControlMappingRules.subjectField: Prefer a Dynamic field equivalent to the source Survey Program name role and preserve Large/Semi bold subject styling.

operationRules.addItem: If Add item exists, it must bind to a valid add/listitem action for Data List/Document Library sources.
operationRules.editItem: If Edit exists, it must bind to a Collection action that opens the selected item using __ctx_coll ListDataID.
operationRules.deleteItem: If Delete exists, it must bind to a Collection action with confirm step, temp variable var_isDeleteConfirmed, condition check, and setdatalist remove scoped by __ctx_coll ListDataID.
operationRules.viewOnlySources: Form Report/Data Report dataset presentations must not include edit/delete item operation controls.

confirm_qs.value: Are you sure that you want to delete this item?

visualIntent.designMockValueBoundary: value remains live runtime binding; Office Asset design comparison is informational only

validationExpectations: Generated dashboards using this template must contain collection_control_responsive_card_wrapper with export-shape subtree fidelity.
Generated dashboards must not replace this template with a generic responsive card, ad hoc card grid, or simplified Collection.
Generated dashboards must map card_col_item fields using Dynamic control types that match the selected data source field types.
Generated dashboards must not emit Dynamic image when the selected data source has no image field.
Generated dashboards may omit card_col_caption and card_col_item_multi_select only for display-only or view-only Form Report/Data Report scenarios.
Generated dashboards must preserve Collection root actions and delete-confirmation temp variable/condition flow whenever item operation buttons are present.
